name: Genoise W/Amaretto Cake
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Leruth, Warren
In a bowl, mix eggs and sugar. Heat over hot water to 115 degrees Fahrenheit, beating until doubled in volume. Sift flour and cornstarch together three times. Carefully fold the sifted flour and cornstarch mixture into the egg mixture. Pour batter into greased and floured 9-inch cake pans. Bake at 425 degrees Fahrenheit until set and springy. Remove from pans and cool on cake racks.
Amaretto/Chocolate Filling: Heat cream to 180 degrees Fahrenheit. Stir in chocolate chips and remove from heat. Stir to melt, then chill overnight. Place half of the genoise on a cake pan and sprinkle with half of the Amaretto. Whip the cream mixture until stiff. Spread one-fourth of the mixture on the cake. Add top layer of cake and sprinkle with remaining Amaretto. Ice top and sides of cake with chocolate filling, reserving some for finishing touches.
